# Multitenant Template

> A production-grade Next.js + Supabase + Vercel starter for SaaS with
> two-level tenancy (Company ↔ Workspace). Designed so AI agents can extend
> it predictably and so a human can ship a new project in a day, not a week.

This repository ships a working auth flow, RLS-based tenant isolation, a
tenant-resolution proxy, and uniform API responses. The intended audience
is two-fold: humans who want a fast starting point, and AI coding agents
who need a structured set of rules so they extend the codebase instead of
improvising against it.

Start here, then dive into the specific docs you need.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): Human quickstart — install, env, run, deploy.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Universal, vendor-neutral rules for any AI agent.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to file issues / submit PRs.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): Vulnerability disclosure + production hardening checklist.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Machine-readable version history.
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): MIT license.
- [docs/CONVENTIONS.md](docs/CONVENTIONS.md): Naming, file layout, antipatterns.
- [docs/RECIPES.md](docs/RECIPES.md): Canonical, copy-pasteable examples.
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Design decisions and trade-offs.
- [docs/AUTH.md](docs/AUTH.md): Magic-link flow, session lifecycle.
- [docs/RLS.md](docs/RLS.md): How to add a new tenant-scoped table.
- [docs/TENANCY.md](docs/TENANCY.md): When to use Company vs Workspace.
- [docs/DEPLOY.md](docs/DEPLOY.md): Vercel + DNS + wildcard SSL.
- [docs/ENV.md](docs/ENV.md): Every env var explained.
- [docs/RBAC.md](docs/RBAC.md): Permission matrix (super_admin / owner / admin / member) and promotion flow.
- [docs/ADMIN.md](docs/ADMIN.md): UI tour of the admin panel and how to test each tier.

## Architecture files (high signal)

- [proxy.ts](proxy.ts): Tenant resolution + auth refresh + cache headers.
- [lib/env.ts](lib/env.ts): Zod-validated env (fail-fast).
- [lib/supabase/server.ts](lib/supabase/server.ts): RLS-respecting server client.
- [lib/supabase/service.ts](lib/supabase/service.ts): RLS-bypassing admin client.
- [lib/tenant/context.ts](lib/tenant/context.ts): Active tenant context for the request (incl. platformRole).
- [lib/tenant/host.ts](lib/tenant/host.ts): Host header → company slug.
- [lib/api/handler.ts](lib/api/handler.ts): `withApi()` wrapper for Route Handlers.
- [lib/api/response.ts](lib/api/response.ts): `ok` / `warn` / `err` shape.
- [lib/api/errors.ts](lib/api/errors.ts): Catalog of API error codes.
- [lib/admin/guards.ts](lib/admin/guards.ts): requireSuperAdmin / requireCompanyAdmin / requireCompanyOwner.
- [lib/admin/audit.ts](lib/admin/audit.ts): recordAuditEvent / extractRequestMeta.
- [scripts/setup-supabase.ts](scripts/setup-supabase.ts): Orchestrate remote Supabase setup.
- [scripts/vercel-cli.ts](scripts/vercel-cli.ts): Orchestrate Vercel project.
- [.github/workflows/deploy.yml](.github/workflows/deploy.yml): CI/CD.
- [supabase/migrations/0003_auth_hook.sql](supabase/migrations/0003_auth_hook.sql): `custom_access_token_hook`.
- [supabase/migrations/0008_hook_platform_role.sql](supabase/migrations/0008_hook_platform_role.sql): hook + platform_role stamp.
- [supabase/migrations/0006_admin_panel.sql](supabase/migrations/0006_admin_panel.sql): audit_events + helpers.

## Agent-facing recipes

- [skills/add-table.md](skills/add-table.md): Add a tenant-scoped table with RLS.
- [skills/add-api-route.md](skills/add-api-route.md): Add a typed Route Handler.
- [skills/add-auth-flow.md](skills/add-auth-flow.md): Add a new auth provider.
- [skills/add-admin-action.md](skills/add-admin-action.md): Add a company-admin operation using the service client.
- [skills/add-super-admin-action.md](skills/add-super-admin-action.md): Add a super_admin-only operation.
- [skills/add-audit-event.md](skills/add-audit-event.md): Emit an audit event from any route.
- [skills/add-workspace.md](skills/add-workspace.md): Workspace create / archive operations.
- [skills/add-member.md](skills/add-member.md): Member invite / role-change / remove operations.
- [skills/setup-supabase.md](skills/setup-supabase.md): Add a new phase to the setup script.
- [skills/vercel-cli.md](skills/vercel-cli.md): Add a subcommand to the Vercel CLI wrapper.
- [skills/deploy-ci.md](skills/deploy-ci.md): Add a job or modify the deploy workflow.

## Distribution

- [registry.json](registry.json): shadcn registry entries — installable via `pnpm dlx shadcn add <owner>/<repo>/<item>`.
- [components.json](components.json): Project aliases config consumed by the shadcn CLI.

## Optional

- [docs/RISKS.md](docs/RISKS.md): Known risks and mitigations (security, performance, scale). Required reading before adding service_role use.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Versioned history of changes (machine-readable for upgrade scripts).
- [examples/end-to-end-flow.md](examples/end-to-end-flow.md): Annotated trace of a request from login to data fetch.
